title: Vector Databases & Search
code:
import numpy as np

def quantize_vector(sub_vectors, centroids):
    indices = []
    for i, sv in enumerate(sub_vectors):
        distances = np.linalg.norm(centroids[i] - sv, axis=1)
        indices.append(np.argmin(distances))
    return indices

def run_practice():
    sub_vectors = [np.array([1.0, 1.0])]
    centroids = [np.array([[0.0, 0.0], [1.2, 1.2]])]
    idx = quantize_vector(sub_vectors, centroids)
    assert idx == [1]
    print('[PASS] Quantizer centroid allocation validated.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
